info.english_meaning: to be impregnated to show great courage to be capable of bearing offsprings
info.hindI_arTa: garBavatI honA amAnavI parAkrama karanA parAkramI honA prajotpatti karane kA sAmarTya honA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: SaktibanDanaM prajAnanasAmarTyaM SaktibanDaH ca  ' SaktO varzayate seke varzet snahe tu varzate ' (Slo. 176) iti devaH
